findings.evidence: Lines 73-85 define generic `{R M}`/`{R V}` theorems in namespace `TauCeti` before `PlumbingGraph`; their only PR uses are the plumbing wrappers later in this file.
findings.fix: Either make these helpers private/local and expose only `PlumbingGraph.intersectionForm_self_add` and `PlumbingGraph.intersectionForm_apply_single_right`, or move the generic theorems to an appropriate general linear-algebra/matrix file and import that here.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.bilinForm_self_add` and `TauCeti.matrix_toBilin'_apply_single_right` are public theorems over arbitrary bilinear forms/matrices, but they live in the plumbing-specific `IntersectionForm.lean`.

summary: Two public generic linear-algebra helpers are placed in the plumbing intersection-form file instead of a generic home or being kept local helpers.
